THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, ROBERT STANLEY, STEPHANIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ROOM #310, 3161 16TH STREET, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

JUDGE BERNARD ZIMMERMAN (PRO TEM) REPORTER BRENDA FIELDS CLERK V. DAVIS 2:50PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT IN PRO PER. MATTER SETTLED AND TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD. PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE FOLLOWING: THE DEFENDANTS AGREE TO MOVE OUT BY 5:00PM ON AUGUST 14, 1994. WHEN THEY MOVE OUT THE PLAIN- TIFF AGREES TO WAIVE ALL BACK RENT AND COSTS. IF THE DEFT'S MOVE OUT BY 8/14/94, THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, ROBERT STANLEY, STEPHANIE
